description: Defines commands and events for Autofill.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the credit card owner.

properties.name: name
properties.description:
address field name, for example GIVEN_NAME.
The full list of supported field names:
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/autofill/core/browser/field_types.cc;l=38

properties.name: value
properties.description: address field value, for example Jon Doe.

properties.name: fields
properties.description: fields and values defining an address.

types.description:
Defines how an address can be displayed like in chrome://settings/addresses.
Address UI is a two dimensional array, each inner array is an "address information line", and when rendered in a UI surface should be displayed as such.
The following address UI for instance:
[[{name: "GIVE_NAME", value: "Jon"}, {name: "FAMILY_NAME", value: "Doe"}], [{name: "CITY", value: "Munich"}, {name: "ZIP", value: "81456"}]]
should allow the receiver to render:
Jon Doe
Munich 81456

properties.name: addressFields
properties.description: A two dimension array containing the representation of values from an address profile.

types.description: Specified whether a filled field was done so by using the html autocomplete attribute or autofill heuristics.

properties.name: htmlType
properties.description: The type of the field, e.g text, password etc.

properties.name: autofillType
properties.description: The actual field type, e.g FAMILY_NAME

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The frame the field belongs to

events.name: addressFormFilled
events.description: Emitted when an address form is filled.

parameters.name: filledFields
parameters.description: Information about the fields that were filled

parameters.name: addressUi
parameters.description:
An UI representation of the address used to fill the form.
Consists of a 2D array where each child represents an address/profile line.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description:
Trigger autofill on a form identified by the fieldId.
If the field and related form cannot be autofilled, returns an error.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: Identifies a field that serves as an anchor for autofill.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifies the frame that field belongs to.

parameters.name: card
parameters.description: Credit card information to fill out the form. Credit card data is not saved.  Mutually exclusive with `address`.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to fill out the form. Address data is not saved. Mutually exclusive with `card`.

commands.name: setAddresses
commands.description: Set addresses so that developers can verify their forms implementation.
